text_original: my only complaint....why the hell do i have to wait a whole day to just chat again? like bruh?!
text_zh: 我唯一的抱怨就是……凭什么我得等上一整天才能再次聊天？兄弟，认真的吗？！
reply_original: I totally understand your frustration! Maintaining high-quality AI involves high server costs, which is why there are limits for free users. We are working hard to offer more ways to earn free messages. If you have more suggestions, please email us at support@fantachat.ai. We'd love to help you stay connected with your favorite characters!
reply_zh: 我完全理解您的沮丧！维护高质量的人工智能需要高昂的服务器成本，这就是为什么对免费用户有所限制。我们正在努力提供更多赚取免费消息额度的方式。如果您有更多建议，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。我们非常希望能帮助您与喜爱的角色保持互动！
